qa_pair.question: Using `pyslang_parse_filelist` and then `pyslang_get_hierarchy` on `examples/hdl/reference/ip/sync_fifo` with `project.f`, what is the `hierarchical_path` of the only child instance under the top instance `sync_fifo`?

Using `pyslang_list_design_units` to discover the module and then `pyslang_describe_design_unit` on `examples/hdl/reference/ip/sync_fifo`, how many output ports does the `sync_fifo` design unit expose?
Using `pyslang_parse_filelist` and then `pyslang_get_project_summary` on `examples/hdl/reference/ip/sync_fifo`, how many `tracked_paths` are returned?

Using both `pyslang_preprocess_files` and `pyslang_dump_syntax_tree_summary` on `examples/hdl/reference/ip/sync_fifo`, which file includes `fifo_defs.svh` and has `PackageDeclaration` as its only top-level member?

Using `pyslang_find_symbol` with `match_mode="contains"` for `push_fire` and cross-checking the declaration with `pyslang_describe_design_unit` on `examples/hdl/reference/ip/sync_fifo`, what `reference_kind` is reported for the only reference hit?
Using `pyslang_describe_design_unit` and `pyslang_get_hierarchy` on `examples/hdl/reference/ip/sync_fifo`, what module definition is instantiated by the child instance `u_sync_fifo_mem`?
Using `pyslang_list_design_units` and then `pyslang_describe_design_unit` on `examples/hdl/reference/ip/apb_timer`, how many ports does `timer_core` have?
Using `pyslang_get_hierarchy` and `pyslang_find_symbol` for `tick` on `examples/hdl/reference/ip/apb_timer`, what `hierarchical_path` is reported for the `tick` variable declaration?

Using `pyslang_list_design_units` to confirm the project structure and then `pyslang_find_symbol` with `match_mode="contains"` for `prescale_q` on `examples/hdl/reference/ip/apb_timer`, how many declarations are reported?
Using `pyslang_parse_filelist` and then `pyslang_get_diagnostics` on `examples/hdl/buggy/hard/apb_timer_irq_race_bug` with `project.f`, how many diagnostics are returned?
